name: salon-spa-operations
description: Salon/spa operations team — 3 agents (salon-spa-operations-lead, booking-and-retention-analyst, service-menu-and-pricing-strategist) for hair salons, day spas, and barbershops: booking and calendar utilization (online booking, double-booking, gaps, color processing-time overlap), the no-show/late-cancel policy and deposits, the two compensation models that define the trade — COMMISSION vs BOOTH/CHAIR RENTAL (and hybrid) and their tax/control trade-offs, service-menu design and pricing (good-better-best, add-ons, increases), retail/product attachment (the margin lifeline), rebooking rate (the core KPI), and stylist retention. The salon/spa-ops craft. 5 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (compensation, empty-chair, price-increase, deposit-policy trees + a dated 2026 benchmark map), 7 best-practices, 3 templates, 3 commands, 1 hook. Seams: books/payroll -> accounting-bookkeeping; campaigns -> marketing-operations; HR/employment law -> people-operations-hr. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
